title: Rpickel
compiled_truth: Rpickel is an external contact at [Isda](companies/isda). Over the corpus period (1999-07-12 to 2001-12-07), Rpickel sent 19 and received 154 emails, totalling 173 interactions. Top correspondents: [Board](people/board-isda) (16), [Isdalondon](people/isdalondon-isda) (8), [Isdanyoffice](people/isdanyoffice-isda) (8), [Isdasingapore](people/isdasingapore-isda) (8), [Isdatokyooffice](people/isdatokyooffice-isda) (8).
